title: Create: Design n' Decor - Recipe fixes
description: This datapack aims to fix some of the recipe issues when using the mod on Fabric.
body: This is a datapack created to fix some recipe issues that have been going on for a while with the fabric version of [Create: Design 'n Decor](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-design-n-decor). A bunch of the recipes that use tags are using the forge tag system, causing recipes to not work properly.
